entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop (Pennisetum glaucum) affected by foliar blast.

entities.name: FOLIAR BLAST
entities.description: A serious disease affecting pearl millet caused by Pyricularia grisea.

entities.name: PYRICULARIA GRISEA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes foliar blast.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where foliar blast has emerged as a serious disease of pearl millet.

entities.name: FOLIAR BLAST RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet to resist the foliar blast disease.

entities.name: ICMR 06222
entities.description: A resistant restorer line of pearl millet.

entities.name: ICMR 07555
entities.description: A resistant restorer line of pearl millet.

entities.name: ICMB 95444
entities.description: A susceptible maintainer line of pearl millet.

entities.name: ICMB 89111
entities.description: A susceptible maintainer line of pearl millet.

entities.name: FIELD AND GREENHOUSE TESTS
entities.description: Tests conducted under field and greenhouse conditions to evaluate foliar blast reaction.
